title: Auto-derive describe from prompt on existing executables
body: When editing an existing executable that has a manually-set describe field in profile.json, the editor should not overwrite it with the auto-derived value unless the user explicitly changes the prompt. Currently describe is always re-derived from the prompt's first line on every save, which could overwrite manual edits. Consider preserving the existing describe when prompt hasn't changed.
rationale: UX issue: existing duties with custom descriptions will have them overwritten on next edit
